name: Brown Seed Bread
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large bowl, combine all-purpose and whole wheat flours, natural bran, rolled oats, sesame and poppy seeds, baking powder, baking soda, and salt.
2. Stir in the liquid honey until the mixture is well blended.
3. Gradually add enough plain yogurt to form a sticky dough.
4. Transfer the dough into a greased loaf pan (9x5 inches or 2L).
5. Bake at 375°F for 40 minutes, or until a tester inserted into the center comes out clean.
